world.comment: World size in units. Map generation uses FBM noise.

bots.comment: Number of bot players. Bots decide actions every thinkIntervalSeconds.

city.comment: population = city HP. Units in damageRadius deal damagePerUnitPerSecond to population. If population <= 0 city is destroyed.

unit.comment: No TTL — units live until killed. floor(population / populationPerUnit) = max units per send.

turret.comment: Border turrets placed every 'spacing' px along influence border. HP = hpRatio * city population. Attack one enemy unit in radius (not other turrets).

formation.comment: Pig formation: triangle 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6... Units keep offset relative to formation leader.

terrain.comment: Zone polygon: 96 directions, step until budget (from population) runs out. Each step costs terrainInfluenceCost.

waterBonus.comment: If terrain around city has >= waterRatioThreshold water: +growthBonus to growth, -penaltyReduction from active unit penalty.

xp.comment: xpNext = baseNextLevel + perLevelFactor * level * levelMultiplier. On level up: choose 1 of 3 cards.

map.comment: FBM noise: below landThreshold = water (deep/shallow/shelf), above = land (low/mid/high/peak).

fog.comment: Three states: unseen (black), seen (dark), visible (clear). Zone + units give visibility.

zones.comment: Show influence polygons. Overlap = neutral, no resource magnet.
